descriptor.support_note: Companion-summary fanout is summary-safe, labels stale or failed delivery honestly, and reopens the same authoritative object on the desktop.

Data/API-run notifications are security-critical: the lock-screen copy never exposes credentials or response bodies, retries coalesce by root cause, and the notification reopens the exact request and result.
Incident-packet notifications are security-critical: the lock-screen copy is a bounded summary, the packet carries stable enums only, and the notification reopens the exact packet and incident.

Notebook-run notifications flow through the one governed envelope, keep lock-screen copy summary-first, honour quiet-hours and admin suppression, coalesce repeated failures, and reopen the exact cell and output.
Offboarding-job notifications are managed-sensitive and run local-only: they reopen the exact export-and-wipe job and declare their companion fanout gap honestly.
Pipeline rerun/cancel notifications coalesce repeated stage failures by root cause and reopen the exact pipeline run they acted on.
Preview-route notifications are summary-safe and reopen the exact route and scope they were serving.
Profiler-capture notifications reopen the exact capture; the capture is local-only and declares no companion fanout to label.
Sync-state notifications are managed-sensitive: admin suppression is honoured, repeated conflict alerts coalesce by root cause, and the notification reopens the exact workspace and conflict.
